title: Why Every Lawyer Should Have an AI Agent Team
excerpt: How I built a team of three AI agents — MaiGai, Sewa, and Ushe — to handle legal research, content creation, and personal assistance. No coding degree required.

title: Lawyering in 2026: Building My Own Digital Firm
excerpt: Lawyering in 2026: Building My Own Digital Firm If you’d told me a year ago that I’d be running my legal practice from my phone, I would have laughed.
